flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at North Dakota State University-Main Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at North Dakota State University-Main Campus are 20% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($62.2k vs $51.8k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at North Dakota State University-Main Campus rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (41.2% → 46.3%).
